title: BetterClient
description: Adds some basic client mods that improve the Minecraft experience!
body:
### This modpacks aims to add client side mods to improve the user expirence when playing minecraft. This includes the following:

- 🧭Minimap🧭: A minimap to see where your going when playing, togglable with `
- ⭐️Performance⭐️: Contains mods like sodium to make minecraft run faster
- 🗡️Durability🗡️: Allows you to see the exact durability of weapons/armor at all times!
- 🍗Hunger🍗: Shows your saturation and how much hunger/health a food will give
- ℹ️Itemsℹ️: Displays item info such as enchantments in your hotbar
- 🎥Freelook🎥: Allows you to quickly go into third person and look around
- 🔎Zoom🔎: Zoom into objects from crazy far distances!
- 💬Chat💬: No reports and smooth animations for chat
- 🔨Options🔨: Fine tune video settings to your preference
- 💡Fullbright💡: See in the dark, easy to turn on/off
- 🐴MountHUD🐴: Food and health of mount is displayed, along with some other improvements!

Other Features:
- Drop full stack of items with ctrl+q
- Wavy Capes
- Advancement Plaques
- Auto Reconnect and "Reconnect" button in multiplayer
- Shulker Box Peek
- Scrollable tooltips
- Waypoints
- Shader support
- Inventory Sorting
- No fog
- Ability to access guis while in a nether portal
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo/)
  
**Current Version**: 1.0.2\
**Latest Supported MC Version**: 1.21.4
